name: agent-bus
description: Local-first event-driven orchestration runtime for AI agents.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --input-type=module -e "import { cpSync, existsSync } from 'node:fs'; if (existsSync('dist/src')) { cpSync('dist/src', 'dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); } if (existsSync('src/storage/migrations')) { cpSync('src/storage/migrations', 'dist/src/storage/migrations', { recursive: true, force: true }); cpSync('src/storage/migrations', 'dist/storage/migrations', { recursive: true, force: true }); }"
